steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is the repeated phrase ‘symbolizes a close, supportive relationship’ and ‘symbolizes their support for each other’ in both Recognition and Students Aspire. This shared emphasis on supportive relationships is the core similarity the student must highlight.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice B directly uses both notes about the symbolic poses showing supportive relationships. The other three either isolate details to one sculpture (A, D) or focus on irrelevant dates (C). That matches choice B — B is correct.
